_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: A similar molecular signature was observed in HMVEC... neurofibromin expression was decreased transiently in response to VEGF
details: VEGF treatment reduced neurofibromin protein expression and enhanced phosphorylation of Akt and Erk kinases, similar to ECFC
